query: SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.createdAt, e.id as establishment_id, e.name as establishment_name, e.createdAt as est_created_at FROM users u LEFT JOIN establishments e ON e.userId = u.id WHERE u.email = 'teste@conta.com';
